about.text:
About ZS | Global Management Consulting & Technology | ZS
About ZS
Improving life and how we live it.
ZS is a management consulting and technology firm that partners with companies to improve life and how we live it. We transform ideas into impact by bringing together data, science, technology and human ingenuity to deliver better outcomes for all. Founded in 1983, ZS has more than 15,000 employees in 40-plus offices worldwide.
Everything we do is designed to strengthen your business strategy and product portfolio, turning insight into action and unlocking new opportunities for growth.

Strategize, build, launch and scale
ZS is your end-to-end partner
We partner with you across every stage of your journey, from defining the right strategy and use cases to building, deploying and scaling solutions and products across the enterprise. We help you ensure the right data, technology, governance and talent are in place to create both practical and transformative success.
Because we know true transformation isn’t just about what’s next, it’s about what’s meaningful and lasts.

Enterprise AI Platforms and Products | ZS
Hero banner image

first
Apply AI at scale, across your business
The right platform can redefine how your business connects, scales and delivers results—whether you’re supporting patients, engaging customers or bringing new products and offers to market.
ZS’s products and platforms are powered by AI, built for complex data and delivered by teams who understand your industry and your business area. The result? Intelligence that fits your goals, connects your ecosystem and delivers impact that matters.

AI you can trust. Insight you can act on.

With trusted intelligence guided by people, your teams can move faster, with confidence and control.
